exploration_notes: The Flink windowing API extension points form a clear inheritance chain. (1) WindowAssigner<T,W> (flink-runtime) is the abstract base with 4 abstract methods: assignWindows(), getDefaultTrigger(), getWindowSerializer(), isEventTime(), plus a nested WindowAssignerContext. (2) MergingWindowAssigner<T,W> extends WindowAssigner adding the abstract mergeWindows(Collection<W>, MergeCallback<W>) method and a MergeCallback<W> interface. (3) Trigger<T,W> (flink-runtime/triggers/) has 3 abstract lifecycle
